infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ReceiptRanger requires access to your photo library to select receipt photos and screenshots for on-device OCR; images never leave your phone.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ReceiptRanger requires access to your camera to capture receipts for on-device OCR; photos never leave your phone.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: ReceiptRanger only adds an image to your photo library when you explicitly save one; images never leave your phone.

plugins.photosPermission: ReceiptRanger requires access to your photo library to select receipt photos and screenshots; images never leave your phone.
plugins.cameraPermission: ReceiptRanger requires access to your camera to capture receipts; photos never leave your phone.

plugins.photosPermission: ReceiptRanger requires access to your photo library to access and scan receipts; images never leave your phone.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: ReceiptRanger requires access to your photo library to save receipts; images never leave your phone.
